  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Real Estate Sales Executive",
  "description": "Cynosure Realty Limited is your trusted partner in premium real estate solutions across Nigeria. We are into Estate Development, Investment Advisory &amp; Portfolio Management, Property Management, Construction, etc.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Real Estate Sales Executive

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	As an Experienced Real Estate Sales Executive at Cynosure Realty, you will be expected to:
	Identify and engage HNIs and corporate clients to build a robust sales pipeline.
	Conduct professional physical and virtual tours of our property listings, highlighting value propositions and investment returns.
	Stay ahead of Abuja&rsquo;s real estate trends to provide expert advice to clients.
	Negotiate pricing and terms of sale efficiently, ensuring a win-win outcome for both the client and the company.
	Leverage social media and professional platforms to showcase listings and enhance Cynosure Realty&rsquo;s market presence.
	Provide detailed weekly reports on lead status, client feedback and market challenges to the management team.


Requirements


	Clear communication skills, creativity and digital literacy.
	Deep knowledge of the Abuja geography and current property valuations.
	A tertiary degree in any discipline.
	The discipline to work independently and hunt for leads without constant supervision.


Remuneration
Salary: N200,000 / month + Juicy Sales Commission.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CV and a brief cover letter to:&nbsp;cynosurerealtygroup@gmail.com&nbsp;using &quot;Application for Real Estate Sales Executive &ndash; [Your Full Name]&quot;&nbsp;as the subject of the email.",

Real Estate Sales Executive Job at Cynosure Realty Limited




        
    

        
        Cynosure Realty Limited is your trusted partner in premium real estate solutions across Nigeria. We are into Estate Development, Investment Advisory & Portfolio Management, Property Management, Construction, etc.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Real Estate Sales Executive

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	As an Experienced Real Estate Sales Executive at Cynosure Realty, you will be expected to:
	Identify and engage HNIs and corporate clients to build a robust sales pipeline.
	Conduct professional physical and virtual tours of our property listings, highlighting value propositions and investment returns.
	Stay ahead of Abuja’s real estate trends to provide expert advice to clients.
	Negotiate pricing and terms of sale efficiently, ensuring a win-win outcome for both the client and the company.
	Leverage social media and professional platforms to showcase listings and enhance Cynosure Realty’s market presence.
	Provide detailed weekly reports on lead status, client feedback and market challenges to the management team.


Requirements


	Clear communication skills, creativity and digital literacy.
	Deep knowledge of the Abuja geography and current property valuations.
	A tertiary degree in any discipline.
	The discipline to work independently and hunt for leads without constant supervision.


Remuneration
Salary: N200,000 / month + Juicy Sales Commission.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CV and a brief cover letter to: [email protected] using "Application for Real Estate Sales Executive – [Your Full Name]" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
